headline: How The FedEx (FDX) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Split On Valuation
summary: The latest fair value estimate for FedEx has shifted from US$376.43 to US$384.96 per share, a modest price target move that fine tunes the existing model rather than resetting expectations. This adjustment comes as Street research splits, with some firms lifting targets into the US$400s on the freight spin off and efficiency story, while others highlight valuation and earnings risk and cluster closer to US$335. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing assumptions and what they...

headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Edmond, Oklahoma Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Edmond, Oklahoma to new owners, Stephen Wheeler and Aaron Edwards. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this PostalAnnex location for the last six years.

headline: Who Will Deliver Your Mail If Post Office Collapses?
summary: For years, the cost of retirement fund payments has hung around the U.S. Postal Service like an albatross. According to Brookings, “As of September 30, 2024, the US Postal Service (USPS) FERS retirement fund balance is approximately $138 billion, which represents 76% of its actuarial liability. Total retirement-related costs for the USPS are significant, reaching ... Who Will Deliver Your Mail If Post Office Collapses?

headline: These 3 Stocks Trigger Bearish Signals but 2 Offer Hidden Opportunity
summary: A death cross forms when a stock’s 50-day moving average crosses below its 200-day moving average, signaling a potential downtrend. Right now, Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE: BMY), FedEx (NYSE: FDX), and Ralph Lauren (NYSE: RL) are all flashing that signal. With the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) at around 25, elevated macro uncertainty is clustering these ... These 3 Stocks Trigger Bearish Signals but 2 Offer Hidden Opportunity

headline: Stocks Slip Before the Open as Oil Prices Advance, U.S. Economic Data and FedEx Earnings on Tap
summary: March S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESH26) are down -0.18%, and March Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQH26) are down -0.27% this morning as oil prices continued to rise amid escalating fighting in the Middle East.
